session.user:
Run ruff linter and formatter check on the two changed files and report results:
``` uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/connect_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_connect_cmd.py && uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/connect_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_connect_cmd.py ```
Report all results including any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff linter and formatter checks on the two changed files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff linter and formatter checks

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (108 > 100) --> src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/connect_cmd.py:36:101 | 34 | @click.option("--shell", is_flag=True, help="Drop into shell instead of launching Claude.") 35 | @click.option("--env", "env_vars", multiple=True, help="Set env var in remote session (KEY=VALUE).") 36 | @click.option("--branch", "-b", help="Branch to checkout on the codespace (default: current local branch).") | ^^^^^^^^ 37 | @click.pass_obj 38 | def connect_codespace( |
Found 1 error.
session.assistant:
**ruff failed: 1 issue found**
**Linting violations:** - `src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/connect_cmd.py:36:101` — E501: Line too long (108 > 100 characters)

The `--branch` option help text exceeds the 100-character line length limit. The line is 108 characters long and needs to be shortened or split.
